title: Origins: Eeveelutions
description: Adds an evolvable Eevee origin to the game.
body:
# The Eeveelutions 
(This is a datapack for the origins mod)
It adds an impact 3 Eevee origin that can evolve into one of the 8 eeveelutions. Eevee itself is intended to be weak but evolving isn't too dificult.

To evolve you need to find the corresponding stone which can be found natrually in chests around the world, which are as follows.

- **Bastion Treasure** - Fire Stone
- **Nether Fortresses** - Fire Stone
- **Ruined Portal Chests** - Fire Stone
- **Dungeons** - Moon Stone, Thunder Stone
- **Abandoned Mineshafts** - Moon Stone, Thunder Stone
- **Jungle Temples** - Leaf Stone
- **Woodland Mansions** - Leaf Stone, Moon Stone, Sun Stone, Fairy Feather
- **Plains Villages** - Leaf Stone
- **Igloos** - Ice Stone
- **Tundra Village Chests** - Ice Stone
- **Ancient City Ice Boxes** - Ice Stone
- **Fishing** - Water Stone
- **Buried Treasure** - Water Stone
- **Shipwrecks** - Water Stone
- **Ancient City Chests** - Moon Stone, Sun Stone
- **Desert Temples** - Sun Stone
- **Desert Villages** - Sun Stone
- **Strongholds** - Fairy Feather, Moon Stone
- **Pillager Outposts** - Fairy Feather

To evolve, just right-click while holding the item in your main hand, with a few exceptions:
- **Umbreon** - Hold a moonstone while exposed to the moon.
- **Espeon** - Hold a sunstone while exposed to the sun.
- **Sylveon** - Hold a fairy feather while in a cherry grove.
**Once you evolve, you can't go back.**

## Natures
When you pick Eevee you are randomly given a nature out of 25. The stats they buff and nerf are exactly the same as the ones in Pokemon with a few exceptions, Sp. Atk. is instead Attack Speed, and Sp. Def. is instead Armor toughness. You're told what your nature is in chat via a whisper. You can also change your nature via making a nature mint.

## Types
All mobs now have types which means for example Glaceon would take more damage from a blaze, the types of every mob are in the gallery.

## Crafting
All of the items in this datapack can be crafted, their recipies are in the gallery.

# Eevee:
It Harbors the potential to evolve into manifold forms. Within Eevee lies the key to the mysteries of Pokémon evolution—I'm certain of it.

- 🟢 Adaptability -Thanks to your short stature, you can at least move around more easily.
- 🟢The Evolution Pokémon -Due to your unstable genetic makeup, you conceal many different possible evolutions.
- 🟢 Tackle -A physical attack in which you charge and slam into the target with your whole body.
- 🟠Eevee Sized -your a block tall, your TINY.. dweeb..
- 🟠Normal type 
- 🔴Unwieldy-You cant hold a shield upright properly with your paws.
- 🔴Lightweight-Your too short to wear and use heavy armor, you would get crushed.
- 🔴Weak-You have seven hearts.
- 🔴Feeble-Your arms are tiny and weak, making it difficult for you to attack.

# Umbreon:
It is most active in the wee hours of the night, when moonlight bathes the land. Its large eyes can pierce the darkness and perceive prey with absolute clarity.

- 🟢Foul Play-A dash that takes a small portion of your enemies damage and adds it to your next attack as bonus damage.
- 🟢Wish-Make a wish upon the stars to heal yourself for a portion of your health and clear all negative effects.
- 🟢Inner Focus-You take no knockback from attacks, and as your health decreases, you take progressively less damage.
- 🟢Night Stalker-Used to the darkness of the night, you have well-developed eyes allowing you to see in the dark.
- 🟢Poison Sweat-When attacked, you secrete a venomous sweat that harms your attacker.
- 🟢Silent-Your footsteps dont cause any vibrations, which could otherwise be picked up by other lifeforms.
- 🟢Stealth-While in the dark, you can blend seamlessly with the shadows, making it harder for mobs to see you.
- 🟠Nightprowler-You are more powerful when exposed to the moon, but you are less powerful when exposed to the sun.
- 🟠Umbreon sized-tad bit shorter.. a wee bit even.. TINY one could say.. 
- 🟠Dark type
- 🔴Carnivore-You hate the taste of vegetables and perfer meat insteat.
- 🔴Sunstruck-You're not used to being out in the sun often, causing you to exhaust more quickly under it.
- 🔴Nine Lives-You only have 9 hearts.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields.
- 🔴Nocturnal-You don't feel the need to sleep.
- 🔴Hydrophobia-You despise getting wet, as it not only ruins your fur but also leaves you feeling uncomfortable
  
# Espeon:
It Wields an arcane power with which it can predict the weather and even people's thoughts. When bathed in sunshine, the scarlet orb on its brow glows and builds energy.

- 🟢Psybeam-Your target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This will also confuse the target.
- 🟢Stored Power-You attack your the target with stored power. The more you are attacked, the greater the move's power. Overexerting this move will overload you.
- 🟢Synchronize-When you are inflicted with a status condition, your attacks will pass the condition to whoever you attack.
- 🟢Paranoia-You will know when someone is watching you.
- 🟢Clairvoyance-You can see entities that are invisible within a certain range.
- 🟢Acrobatics-You never take fall damage, no matter how high you fall.
- 🟢Synapse-Your a quick learner and gain experience at an increased rate.
- 🟢Strong Ankles-You are able to jump higher while sprinting.
- 🟢Radiance-When exposed to the sun you are able to absorb the light and gain small buffs.
- 🟢Twilight Gaze-Your eyes provide you with perfect vision in the dark.
- 🟢Subtle:Your footsteps dont cause any vibrations, which could otherwise be picked up by other lifeforms.
- 🟠Espeon sized -Your pretty short,barely even over a block tall.
- 🟠Psychic type
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. And dont even try using telekinesis, its too heavy.
- 🔴Mental Fragility-When critically struck you are left dazed and stunned briefly.
- 🔴Feeble-Your arms just aren't as strong as others, leaving you with weaknened attacks.
- 🔴Hydrophobia-You despise getting wet, as it not only ruins your fur but also leaves you feeling uncomfortable
- 🔴Fragile-You only have 8 hearts.
  
# Flareon:
Flames burn within a saclike organ inside this Pokémon. When Flareon inhales, these flames grow in intensity, reaching a mighty 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

- 🟢Flamethrower-Your target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This will also leave the target with a burn.
- 🟢Heat Wave-You attack by exhaling hot breath on your targets. This may also leave those targets with a burn.
- 🟢Flash Fire-Powers up the Pokémon's moves if it's set on fire.
- 🟢Overheat-When standing on a magma block and while on fire, you can sacrifice HP to absorb the extra heat, causing you to overheat. While overheated, your strength is greatly increased.
- 🟢Inferno-Enemies near you have a chance to catch fire from the heat you radiate.
- 🟢Ignition-Your physical attacks can occasionally ignite your enemies, burning them over time.
- 🟢Fireproof-You can handle any kind of heat with ease.
- 🟢Frostproof-Your fire typing makes ice-related damage negligible.
- 🟢Lava Sight-You have the ability to see nearly perfectly while submerged in lava.
- 🟢Hot Blooded-Any kind of poison that tries to enter your body is instantly burned up, making you immune to them.
- 🟠Flareon sized -Your pretty short, barely even over a block tall, and your fat? yikes man.
- 🟠Fire type
- 🔴Cryophobe-While you can tolerate it, overly cold biomes are really just not your taste.
- 🔴Combustible- Receiving an attack can sometimes damage the flame sac in your body, causing it to explode. This will most likely kill you.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. Last time you even tried using one it went up in flames.
- 🔴Hydrophobia-You despise getting wet, it soaks into your fur and weighs you down considerably.

# Jolteon:
It bristles its fur into sharp, needlelike points when enraged. One can hear electricity crackle in its breath when it exhales.

- 🟢Wild Charge-You shroud yourself in electricity and smash into your target. This move has recoil and has a chance to strike the target with lightning.
- 🟢Thunderbolt-You attack your target with a strong electric blast. 
- 🟢Quick Feet-Boosts your Speed stat if you have a status condition.
- 🟢Overdrive-While your charge bar is full and you are standing on a redstone block, you can sacrifice some HP to enter overdrive. During overdrive, your speed is greatly increased.
- 🟢Tempest Edge-When in a thunderstorm, you become electrified, enhancing your movements and empowering your attacks.
- 🟢Surge-Surrounded by ionized particles, you periodically discharge lightning that shocks and damages nearby enemies.
- 🟢Pointy Fur-Your fur is pointy enough to occasionally prick your attacker, reflecting a bit of damage.
- 🟢Static-You can sometimes build up enough static electricity to strike your opponents with lightning.
- 🟢Speedster-Your naturally faster then most people.
- 🟠Jolteon sized-Your even shorter than the rest of your counter parts, a tragedy.
- 🟠Charge-You have a bar of energy that depletes over time. When this bar is low, you will feel weaker, and when this bar is full, you will be stronger. (You can replenish this bar by standing on a redstone block or by eating redstone.)
- 🟠Electric type
- 🔴Brittle Bones-Your frail physique causes you to take additional fall damage.
- 🔴Fragile-You have 8 hearts instead of 10.
- 🔴Fast Metabolism-Your rapid metabolism requires constant fuel, causing you to get hungry much faster than others.
- 🔴Insomniac-Your high energy levels prevent you from ever feeling tired, making it impossible for you to sleep.
- 🔴Need for Speed-You rely on your agility and speed, preventing you from using heavier armors.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. Besides it'd just slow you down.
- 🔴Short Circut-Trying to use your abilities in water causes them to malfunction and shock you. 

# Vaporeon:
Tests show that its cells closely resemble water molecules, which perhaps explains its ability to conceal its form while submerged. Some believe the origins of mermaid folklore lie with this Pokémon.

- 🟢Hydro Pump-Your target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.
- 🟢Aqua Jet-You can use water to propel yourself at at high speeds. This move is much stronger in the rain or in water!
- 🟢Water Absorb-You can absorb the water around you to heal yourself.
- 🟢Stealth-When in water, you can become almost invisible, blending with your surroundings.
- 🟢Aqua Affinity-You can break blocks in water just as others do on land.
- 🟢Fishy Appetite-Eating fish satisfies your hunger more than other foods.
- 🟢Heat Resistance-Your water affinity grants you increased resilience against fire, reducing damage from flames and heat.
- 🟢Aquanetics-You have full mastery of your mobility in the water.
- 🟢Fins-Your fins grant swift agility in water, allowing you to move with ease through water.
- 🟢Amphibious-You can breathe in both water and on land alike.
- 🟢Hydroscopic Vision-You have the ability to see clearly underwater.
- 🟠Vaporeon sized -Your short, not crazy short atleast.. Could be worse.
- 🟠Water type
- 🔴Piscivore-You find other foods unappealing compared to the satisfying taste of fish.
- 🔴Evaporation-Due to your genetic makeup being predominantly water, you evaporate in hotter climates. 
- 🔴Thermophobia-In hotter places, you feel significantly weaker and less capable.
- 🔴Slippery-You find it difficult to keep your footing out of water.
- 🔴Fish Out of Water-While out of water, your movements are sluggish and your jump height is hindered.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws- .. fins? Whatever you get the idea.
  
# Leafeon:
Cells similar to those of plants have been found in its fur. Its hard tail can fell a large tree with one stroke, and the tail’s sharpness exceeds even that of a sword crafted by a master.

- 🟢Leaf Blade-The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target.
- 🟢Aerial Ace-You use speed to confound the target, and then slash. This also boosts your attack for momentarily.
- 🟢Chlorophyll-Your speed is increased when exposed to sunlight.
- 🟢Photosynthesis-Every 30 seconds you use your stored sunlight and convert it into food for yourself.
- 🟢Verdant Energy-You thrive in forests, feeling right at home among the trees and greenery.
- 🟢Fresh Air-Your plant-like cells emit a refreshing air that helps nearby crops grow much faster.
- 🟠Leafeon sized-Your pretty short.. at least not as short as SOME people, yikes.
- 🟠Grass type
- 🔴Vegetarian-You prefer plant-based foods and find meat unappealing.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. Besides your better off just dodging attacks.
- 🔴Cryophobe -Colder biomes render you too weak to perform your moves or traverse easily.

# Glaceon:
It is known to be able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around.

- 🟢Icy Wind:You attack with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers the speed of anyone who is hit with it.
- 🟢Snowscape-Summon a snowstorm lasting a few seconds. While the storm is active, your defense is boosted.
- 🟢Snow Cloak-When attacked you envelop yourself in a flurry of snow giving you the opportunity to escape.
- 🟢Snowveil-The air around you freezes in your presence! It causes people nearby to be slowed by its icy chill.
- 🟢Arctic Refuge-Comfortable in cold regions, you move swiftly and withstand more damage, feeling at ease in the frosty terrain.
- 🟢Acrobatics-You never take fall damage, no matter how high you fall.
- 🟢Glaciate-Your adaptation to freezing temperatures has honed your agility, allowing you to move freely even in the most frigid conditions without being slowed down.
- 🟢Frostbite-Your strikes can sometimes cause frostbite, freezing your target in place.
- 🟢Subtle:Your footsteps dont cause any vibrations, which could otherwise be picked up by other lifeforms.
- 🟠Glaceon sized -Your even shorter than the rest of your counter parts, a tragedy.
- 🟠Ice type
- 🔴Nine lives-You only have 9 hearts
- 🔴Elegant-You hate being attacked since it damages your elegance.
- 🔴Pyrophobia-Your natural weakness to fire makes you highly vulnerable to heat, causing you to melt quickly.
- 🔴Meltable-You cant stand higher temperatures, causing you to be weaker in hotter regions.
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. Besides, it'd probably freeze and shatter anyways.

# Sylveon:
It emits a soothing aura from its ribbon-shaped organs. It wraps these appendages around quarrelers to instantly restore calm to the situation.

- 🟢Moonblast-Borrowing the power of the moon, You can attack your traget. This may also lower the target’s offensive stats. You must be in the air to use this move
- 🟢Dazzling Gleam-You emit a powerful flash of light to inflict damage on the target.
- 🟢Pixilate-When attacking, you build up charge to your pixilate bar. If you attack while the bar is full, your next attack will deal increased damage and reset your bar. However, if you are attacked while your bar is full, the damage will be negated entirely and the bar will be reset.
- 🟢Enchanted Glades-You thrive in vibrant, mystical biomes, feeling more at ease than in mundane surroundings.
- 🟢Elegant Steps-Your stylish dances can give you a temporary boost in your abilities and mental state.(spam crouch)
- 🟢Graceful-Your graceful and percise movements provide you with increased damage in the air.
- 🟢Mesmerizing Ribbons-Your feelers emit a captivating aura, causing nearby mobs to let their guard down and become distracted.
- 🟢Floral Harmony-Being near flowers fills you with tranquility.
- 🟠Fairy type
- 🔴Unwieldy-You have paws, not hands, and they aren't meant to hold shields. They dont really match your style anyways.
- 🔴Desolation-You feel uneasy and weakened in eerie and ominous biomes.
- 🔴Inexperienced-Due to your limited survival skills, you find yourself getting tired faster than most.
 -🔴Decreased breath hold time
 -🔴Increased Exhaustion
 -🔴Unable to use maps
